# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Kalshi loses bid to override New York state gambling laws in federal court](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-loses-bid-to-override-new-york-state-gambling-laws-in-federal-court.html): A federal judge rejected Kalshi's attempt to use its CFTC-regulated status to preempt New York state gambling laws, dealing the prediction-markets platform a significant legal setback.
- [Google Bans Prediction Market Transactions, Draws Industry Backlash](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/google-bans-prediction-market-transactions-draws-industry-backlash.html): Google has banned transactions related to prediction markets on its platform, a move that has prompted significant pushback from the prediction market industry.
- [Love Island Betting Markets Expand as Reality TV Contracts Go Mainstream](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/love-island-betting-markets-expand-as-reality-tv-contracts-go-mainstream.html): Prediction markets have added Love Island as a tradeable event, marking a significant push by platforms to attract retail bettors through popular reality-TV programming in 2025.
- [Polymarket launches U.S. influencer blitz, MLB deals to rebuild trust post-ban](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-launches-u-s-influencer-blitz-mlb-deals-to-rebuild-trust-post-ban.html): Polymarket announced a broad U.S. marketing campaign on July 8, 2026, including TikTok influencer deals, Major League Baseball partnerships, and media agreements with CNN and CNBC as it works to re-establish credibility following a four-year domestic ban.
- [Sinner Heavy Kalshi Favorite Over Djokovic at Wimbledon](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/sinner-heavy-kalshi-favorite-over-djokovic-at-wimbledon.html): Jannik Sinner is listed as a heavy favorite against Novak Djokovic on Kalshi's Wimbledon prediction market, according to Sports Illustrated's coverage of the event contract.
- [Kalshi traders see Hormuz traffic disruption lasting through 2027](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-traders-see-hormuz-traffic-disruption-lasting-through-2027.html): Prediction-market bettors on Kalshi are forecasting that shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will not normalize until at least 2027, following the latest geopolitical setback to regional maritime routes.
- [Muni Bond Market Eyes Prediction Markets as Risk and Opportunity](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/muni-bond-market-eyes-prediction-markets-as-risk-and-opportunity.html): Municipal bond analysts warn that the rapid growth of prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket introduces both pricing opportunities and liquidity risks for the $4 trillion muni sector, according to Bond Buyer.
- [Kalshi appeals NY court loss blocking sports event-contract state enforcement](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-appeals-ny-court-loss-blocking-sports-event-contract-state-enforcement.html): Kalshi filed a same-day appeal to the Second Circuit on Tuesday, July 8, 2026, after SDNY Judge Analisa Torres denied its bid to stop New York State Gaming Commission officials from enforcing state gambling laws against its sports event contracts.
- [Polymarket Races to Rebuild Trust With US Market Recommitment](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-races-to-rebuild-trust-with-us-market-recommitment.html): Polymarket is mounting a campaign to restore credibility and re-enter the US prediction-market space after a period of regulatory uncertainty and reputational damage, according to reporting by AP News and Yahoo Finance.
- [Polymarket odds call Johor state election before polls close Saturday](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-odds-call-johor-state-election-before-polls-close-saturday.html): Prediction platform Polymarket has effectively declared a winner in Malaysia's Johor state election ahead of Saturday's vote, with contract prices reflecting a decisive anticipated outcome, according to South China Morning Post.
